name: Stickman Fighter Infinity - Super Action Heroes
description: Stickman Fighter Infinity - Super Action Heroes is a free-to-play stickman fighting game. All you need to do to role-play as heroes and fight against villains in the universe is cleverly using buttons to move, jump, teleport, block, attack and transform. This extremely simple gameplay, top-notch graphics effect, and vivid sound have attracted many players around the world.
instructions: Spin the free lucky wheel to get surprising rewards whenever you want Try to complete daily quests and achieve milestones to get lots of rewards Free gifts are available at any time
tags: Adventure, Anime, Batman, Cartoon, Cartoon Network, Fight, Fighting, Mobile, PacMan, Spiderman, Stickman, Super, Superhero, War
